updateNote: Day 60 Afternoon PT refresh — Trump Truth Social: Iran 'in a State of Collapse'; attacks German Chancellor Merz as condoning Iranian nuclear weapon. Rubio: Hormuz an 'economic nuclear weapon.' IDF strikes ~20 Hezbollah targets across Beqaa Valley & southern Lebanon — biggest wave since Apr 16 ceasefire extension; destroys two ~2km cross-border tunnels in Qantara built with 'direct guidance from Iran.' Pope Leo XIV at St. Peter's Basilica decries 'delusion of omnipotence' fueling the war. Pezeshkian to Pakistani PM Sharif: US must 'remove operational obstacles' before talks. Markets: Brent stable $111.16 (+39.23%); WTI corrected to $99.62 (+31.93%); AAA gas $4.176 (+33.4%). Hormuz Day 57. War Powers May 1 — 3 days.
